note: Machine-readable system map. A repository scanner should build its architectural map from THIS file, not by ranking README language. Each claim carries a grade + evidence; a scanner verifies claims against evidence and rejects any claim contradicted by a NON-CLAIMS record. Roles are registered mythological terms (docs/mythological-vocabulary.md) — no coined names.

superseded_docs.note: Present in the repo but must_not_govern_new_work — see CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json#superseded

components.name: clotho
components.role_meaning: creates and maintains knowledge-graph threads across artifacts and repositories
components.purpose: provenance-aware knowledge-graph weaver over the TELOS spine

claims.statement: PACKAGE_ROOTS is exactly the five TELOS-spine packages with an explicit tested exclusion of the three products (AM-40)
the shared D33 scanner is correct over a closed source profile and fails closed on b1-b6 (AM-41)
committed weaver inventories are proven equal to their derived closures
the frozen inventory-id table and the D32 loader-safe-exports map are exact and frozen

non_claims: does not prove loader analysis or containment
no orchestrator / test / doc / ledger weaver yet (tasks 4b/5)

specified_pending.note: Frozen v15 tasks not yet implemented. Their machine-first design substrate (contracts, invariants, decisions, comprehension queries) exists under clotho/memory/ with status SPECIFIED-PENDING-IMPLEMENTATION; an implementer loads it and must pass the per-task comprehension gate before writing code. Claims are grade:cited (frozen spec), not executable (no code yet).

components.name: build-gate
components.role_note: implements the TELOS gate (TELOS governs review/evidence/authorization/execution); mythological ownership is not asserted for the package name per docs/mythological-vocabulary.md
components.purpose: the gate (gate.mjs), per-seat HMAC signing, the council orchestrator, and the Daedalus workshop
components.trust_domain: certifies from disk + signatures + provenance, never a self-report

components.name: breakout
components.purpose: adversarial self-challenge + verdict-on-facts (verifier.mjs) and a minimal MCP stdio client

components.name: connectors/ai-peer-mcp
components.purpose: MCP server exposing model backends with real per-seat provenance
components.trust_domain: provider-native structured output; provenance != HMAC signature

components.name: merkle-dag
components.purpose: content-addressed planning, Ed25519 verified delegation, append-only signed ledger, pure done() gate

components.name: contracts
components.purpose: the human-readable protocol the gate enforces

role_modules.name: daedalus
role_modules.kind: role module — a registered role realized by code + protocol + run lineage, not a top-level package
role_modules.status: active (serial loop for small deltas; parallel authorship HELD by The Eye 2026-07-15, implemented fail-closed)

claims.statement: workshop protocol constants and every claimed state-machine terminal equal what build-gate/daedalus.mjs enforces (terminals probed, not paraphrased)
the plan-maturation chain v11-v15 re-hashes from disk and matches CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json exactly (one active version; the two authorization refusals preserved)
a parallel-authorship request without an adapter blocks (PARALLEL_AUTHORSHIP_UNAVAILABLE) rather than silently downgrading to serial

non_claims: does not authorize (TELOS does; convergence is not authorization)
does not validate plan content truth (process structure only)
cannot amend an Eye ruling (fixed input)
